project.name: Module 16e: New-Tab Dashboard
project.description: Pro-gated new-tab override page with bookmark search dashboard. Replaces Chrome's new tab page with a privacy-focused command-palette search (shadcn Command component) for quick bookmark access. Shows recent bookmarks, folder quick-nav, and search. Implements SyncableFeature for dashboard config (layout preferences). WXT newtab entrypoint. Gated by useProGate() — free users see the dashboard with an upgrade banner (not a full block — lets them experience the value before converting).
project.parent_plan: Hush Consolidated Build Plan — Day 5 (Pro features)
project.critical_path_position: Depends on Module 16a (ProGate) and Module 15a (SyncableFeature). Must execute after both. Last feature module before Modules 17-18 (testing + store prep).

holy_pb_shortfalls.note: New-tab dashboard is new infrastructure with no Holy PB equivalent. No upstream code to audit.

user_stories.title: New-tab entrypoint scaffolding and auth routing
user_stories.description: Create entrypoints/newtab/ directory with WXT newtab override. Full-page React app with its own SessionProvider (independent of popup/manager, same pattern as Module 13). Auth screens reused (LoginScreen, SetupScreen) — user must unlock before seeing dashboard. Skeleton DashboardScreen placeholder. Inherits dark mode from popup/manager pattern.
steps: Research WXT newtab entrypoint requirements (index.html structure, meta tags, chrome_url_overrides)
Create entrypoints/newtab/index.html (with chrome_url_overrides.newtab in manifest)
Create entrypoints/newtab/main.tsx (React root + initSentry + theme init — same as manager/main.tsx)
Create entrypoints/newtab/DashboardApp.tsx with useSessionProvider, auth routing, skeleton DashboardScreen
RED: Test: 'DashboardApp shows login screen when locked'
RED: Test: 'DashboardApp shows dashboard when unlocked'
RED: Test: 'DashboardApp shows setup screen on first use'
RED: Test: 'DashboardScreen renders skeleton/loading state'
GREEN: Implement all files. Reuse LoginScreen, SetupScreen, ErrorBoundary.
REFACTOR: Ensure auth screen reuse (zero duplication). Verify newtab in manifest.
acceptance_criteria: entrypoints/newtab/ creates chrome_url_overrides.newtab in manifest
DashboardApp has its own SessionProvider (independent instance)
Locked state → LoginScreen (reused from Module 10)
First-time → SetupScreen (reused from Module 10)
Unlocked → DashboardScreen (skeleton placeholder for DASH-002)
Dashboard shows skeleton/loading state before data loads
No blocking network requests before first paint
Dark mode supported (same pattern as manager)
initSentry() called in main.tsx
ErrorBoundary wraps app root
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/entrypoints/newtab && npx tsc --noEmit && npx wxt build

user_stories.title: Dashboard components — search, recent bookmarks, folder nav
user_stories.description: Build the three dashboard components: DashboardSearch (shadcn Command wrapping useSearch), RecentBookmarks (grid of most recently added bookmarks), FolderNav (horizontal folder list). Wire into DashboardScreen from DASH-001. Selecting a bookmark opens it in the current tab via browser.tabs.update.
steps: Install shadcn Command component (if not already installed)
Create components/dashboard/DashboardSearch.tsx: Command component wrapping bookmark search. Uses useSearch hook from Module 13. Opens bookmarks on select (browser.tabs.update for current tab).
Create components/dashboard/RecentBookmarks.tsx: grid of most recently added bookmarks (sorted by dateAdded desc, limit 12).
Create components/dashboard/FolderNav.tsx: horizontal folder list for quick navigation.
Wire all three components into DashboardScreen in DashboardApp.tsx
RED: Test: 'DashboardSearch renders Command component'
RED: Test: 'DashboardSearch filters bookmarks via useSearch'
RED: Test: 'RecentBookmarks shows most recent 12 bookmarks by dateAdded'
RED: Test: 'FolderNav lists top-level folders'
RED: Test: 'Selecting bookmark calls browser.tabs.update (not .create)'
GREEN: Implement all components. Reuse useSearch hook.
REFACTOR: Ensure layout is centered search + grid + folder nav. Verify keyboard navigation.
acceptance_criteria: DashboardSearch uses shadcn Command with bookmark results from useSearch
DashboardSearch provides keyboard navigation (up/down/enter)
RecentBookmarks: top 12 by dateAdded, grid layout
FolderNav: horizontal list of top-level folders
Selecting bookmark opens in current tab (browser.tabs.update, not .create)
Verify browser.tabs.update works from newtab page without additional permissions (extension-owned tab)
Dashboard layout: centered search bar, recent bookmarks grid, folder nav
user_stories.verification: npx vitest run tests/unit/components/dashboard && npx tsc --noEmit

user_stories.title: Pro gating with upgrade banner and SyncableFeature
user_stories.description: Dashboard is visible to free users but with a top banner encouraging upgrade. Pro users get the full clean experience. Create DashboardConfigSyncFeature implementing SyncableFeature (layout preferences like recent count, folder order). The dashboard itself works for free users — the Pro gate is soft (banner, not block) to let users experience value before converting.
steps: Create components/dashboard/UpgradeBanner.tsx: dismissible banner at top of dashboard for free users. 'Upgrade to Pro for ad-free dashboard and sync.' Shows only when useProGate().isPro is false.

Create lib/dashboard-config.ts: DashboardConfig type { recentCount: number; showFolderNav: boolean; layout: 'grid' | 'list' }. DashboardConfigSyncFeature implements SyncableFeature (featureId='dashboard-config', requiresServer()=false).
RED: Test: 'Free user sees UpgradeBanner'
RED: Test: 'Pro user does not see UpgradeBanner'
RED: Test: 'UpgradeBanner is dismissible'
RED: Test: 'DashboardConfigSyncFeature implements SyncableFeature'
RED: Test: 'DashboardConfigSyncFeature.requiresServer returns false'
RED: Test: 'DashboardConfig stored in chrome.storage.local (not encrypted tree)'
GREEN: Implement components and config.
acceptance_criteria: Free users see dismissible upgrade banner — NOT a full block
Pro users see clean dashboard (no banner)
DashboardConfig: recentCount, showFolderNav, layout
DashboardConfigSyncFeature implements SyncableFeature
DashboardConfigSyncFeature.requiresServer() returns false (Option A)
Config persisted in chrome.storage.local (not encrypted tree — it's preferences, not sensitive data)
lib/dashboard-config.ts has zero React imports (lib/ purity)

what_exists.session_provider: hooks/useSessionProvider.tsx — shared session infrastructure (SessionProvider component, useSessionState, useSessionDispatch, useTreeContext hooks). Reusable across entrypoints.
what_exists.auth_screens: components/screens/LoginScreen.tsx + SetupScreen.tsx — shared, reusable across entrypoints (popup, manager, newtab)
what_exists.search: hooks/useSearch.ts — useSearch(tree, query, delay?) → { results: readonly Bookmark[]; isSearching: boolean }
what_exists.manager_pattern: entrypoints/manager/ — reference for new entrypoint (3 files: index.html, main.tsx, ManagerApp.tsx)
what_exists.sentry: lib/sentry.ts — initSentry() called in main.tsx of each entrypoint
what_exists.theme_init: localStorage-based dark mode toggle pattern in manager/main.tsx (lines 10-24)
what_exists.error_boundary: components/ErrorBoundary.tsx — wraps app root in each entrypoint

what_does_not_exist.newtab: No entrypoints/newtab/ directory. No newtab in manifest.
what_does_not_exist.command: shadcn Command component not installed (check components/ui/command.tsx before starting).
what_does_not_exist.pro_gate: hooks/useProGate.ts does not exist yet — depends on Module 16a
what_does_not_exist.syncable_feature: SyncableFeature interface not in lib/types.ts yet — depends on Module 15a

tech_stack.wxt_newtab: WXT newtab entrypoint: entrypoints/newtab/index.html. Generates chrome_url_overrides.newtab in manifest. Research WXT docs for exact newtab entrypoint requirements.
tech_stack.shadcn_command: shadcn Command component — based on cmdk. Install via shadcn CLI if not present. Provides search input + results list with keyboard navigation.
tech_stack.tab_navigation: browser.tabs.update(tabId, { url }) to navigate current tab to selected bookmark. NOT browser.tabs.create (which opens new tab).
forbidden_patterns: Full-blocking Pro gate on dashboard (use soft banner instead)
Duplicating auth screen logic (reuse shared screens)
Storing dashboard preferences in encrypted tree (use chrome.storage.local — preferences are not sensitive)

dashboard_philosophy.soft_gate: Dashboard is visible to free users with an upgrade banner. This lets users experience the value (quick search, recent bookmarks) before deciding to upgrade. Hard-blocking would prevent discovery of the feature's value.
dashboard_philosophy.current_tab: Search results open in the CURRENT tab (new-tab page), not a new tab. This matches user expectation: type search → select result → page loads in same tab.
dashboard_philosophy.minimal_state: Dashboard preferences (layout, recent count) stored in chrome.storage.local — NOT in the encrypted tree. Preferences are not sensitive bookmark data.

option_b_readiness.dashboard_config_sync: DashboardConfigSyncFeature implements SyncableFeature. Today: local config only. Option B: dashboard preferences synced via backend.

read_first: entrypoints/manager/ (reference: creating new entrypoint with shared components)

inputs.what_it_provides: Session state, auth routing, SessionProvider component
Error boundary wrapper with Sentry integration

known_risks.issue: Chrome new-tab override may deter some users
known_risks.action: Users can disable the extension's newtab override in Chrome settings. Document this in store listing.
Dashboard needs to load fast. Use GET_STATE for initial data (same as popup). Skeleton loading state. No blocking network requests before first paint.

known_risks.issue: shadcn Command component may not be installed
known_risks.action: Install via shadcn CLI: pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add command. Check before starting.
Research WXT docs for newtab entrypoint requirements. May need specific index.html structure or meta tags.

dependency_chain.upstream: Module 16a (ProGate — required), Module 15a (SyncableFeature — required for dashboard config sync)
dependency_chain.downstream: Module 17 (E2E tests cover dashboard). Module 18 (store prep includes dashboard screenshot).
dependency_chain.parallel_safe: Can run in parallel with 16b, 16c, 16d — all share 16a dependency but are otherwise independent

metadata.session_protocol: One Claude Code session. Research WXT newtab entrypoint + shadcn Command. Commit per story.
metadata.quality_gate: All tests pass. tsc clean. wxt build includes newtab. Soft Pro gate (banner, not block). Auth screens reused. Search works.
metadata.human_review_required: Verify: newtab loads, search works, recent bookmarks visible, bookmark opens in current tab, upgrade banner for free users.

execution_rules.prd_scope: Module 16e of 22. Last feature module. Pro feature with soft gate.
